data.title: AI Convergence 2026 Set to Explore AI and Web3 Opportunities in Hong Kong
data.description: AI Convergence 2026 is scheduled for April 20, 2026, at the AWS HK Office in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. According to NS3.AI, the event is jointly hosted by Bixin and TRON DAO, and will concentrate on the implementation and commercial opportunities of AI and Web3 technologies.

data.title: Web3 Payments and Stablecoins to Take Center Stage at RWA & Payments 2026 Event
data.description: RWA & Payments 2026 is set to take place on April 20, 2026, at the AWS Hong Kong Office in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. According to NS3.AI, the event is being jointly hosted by Mask Network, BenPay, and StableStock. It will focus on discussions around Web3 payments, stablecoins, real-world assets (RWA), and on-chain financial infrastructure.

data.title: Hong Kong Police Report Romance Scam Involving Cryptocurrency
data.description:
A recent report from Hong Kong police's 'Cyber Defender' platform reveals a romance scam resulting in a loss exceeding HKD 2 million. According to BlockBeats, the scam involved a fraudster who initiated contact with a woman in her fifties on Instagram, quickly establishing a romantic relationship. The scammer posed as a 'cryptocurrency investment expert,' promising guaranteed returns.

The victim was first asked to transfer HKD 40,000 as an 'account opening fee.' Subsequently, she was persuaded to exchange cash for USDT at a physical exchange store in seven separate transactions, transferring the funds to the scammer's electronic wallet. Once the funds were secured, the scammer disappeared and cut off all communication.

Police advise the public to exercise caution when forming online relationships. If someone claims to be an investment expert and requests money transfers for any reason, individuals should pause and reconsider before proceeding.

data.title: Hong Kong and China Sign Memorandum to Boost AI and Blockchain Collaboration
data.description: Hong Kong's Secretary for Innovation, Technology and Industry, Sun Dong, and Wang Jingtao, Deputy Director of China's Cyberspace Administration, have signed a memorandum of cooperation. According to Foresight News, the agreement focuses on advancing key areas such as artificial intelligence, cross-border data, and blockchain. The initiative aims to implement China's 15th Five-Year Plan, support Hong Kong's development as an international innovation and technology hub, and promote a new economy driven by technological innovation. The collaboration seeks to enhance Hong Kong's integration into national development strategies. Both parties will strengthen cooperation to advance new productivity, deepen cybersecurity collaboration, and enhance international exchanges and promotion.

data.title: U.S. to Impose Blockade on Iranian Ports Amid Tensions
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump announced on his social media platform that the United States will enforce a blockade on ships entering and exiting Iranian ports at 10 a.m. Eastern Time on April 13. According to BlockBeats, this decision follows unsuccessful negotiations between the United States and Iran.

On April 12, President Trump expressed indifference towards Iran's willingness to return to the negotiating table. He reiterated the plan to impose the blockade and voiced disappointment over NATO's lack of support for the U.S. in the conflict involving Iran.

data.title: Deutsche Bank Strategists: U.S. Inflation Impact from Middle East Ceasefire Could Be Temporary
data.description: On April 13, Deutsche Bank strategists released a report indicating that the U.S. Treasury market will need to assess the impact of the Middle East conflict ceasefire on U.S. inflation. According to Jin10, if the ceasefire persists, the inflation surge is likely to be viewed as a temporary phenomenon. The strategists expect the Federal Reserve to resume interest rate cuts in September. They also highlighted the need to monitor the war's potential impact on Treasury issuance, as Congress might allocate additional funds for the military. Deutsche Bank strategists anticipate that any increase in issuance will remain moderate and primarily involve long-term financing, helping to avoid pressure on long-term yields.

data.title: Hyperbridge Gateway Contract Attacked, Hacker Gains $237,000
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Hyperbridge's gateway contract has been compromised in a recent attack, according to CertiK Alert. The attacker manipulated the administrator privileges of the Polkadot token contract on Ethereum by forging messages. This breach allowed the hacker to mint and sell one billion tokens, resulting in a profit of approximately $237,000.

data.title: Nine newly created wallets withdrew 87.76 million Binance Life tokens from Binance, worth $14.9 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, in the past 24 hours, nine new wallets withdrew 87.76 million Binance Tokens from Binance, worth $14.9 million.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | UBP Increases Gold Holdings, Forecasts Year-End Price to Reach $6,000
data.description: Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) has increased its gold holdings, projecting that the price of gold will reach $6,000 by the end of the year. According to Jin10, the bank's decision to bolster its gold reserves reflects a strategic move in response to anticipated market conditions. UBP's forecast suggests a significant rise in gold prices, driven by factors such as global economic uncertainties and inflationary pressures. The bank's outlook aligns with broader market sentiment, where investors are increasingly turning to precious metals as a hedge against volatility. This move by UBP underscores the growing importance of gold in investment portfolios amid fluctuating financial markets.

data.title: AI Convergence 2026 will be held on April 20, 2026 at the AWS HK Office in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
data.description: AI Convergence 2026 will be held on April 20, 2026, at the AWS HK Office in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. The event will focus on the fusion and innovation of AI and Web3, exploring the application and business opportunities of AI projects in the crypto space. The event will feature a dual-zone structure: a main stage with keynotes, panels, and interviews, and a showcase area with project demos and a space for open networking. It is co-hosted by Bixin and TRON DAO, with participation from projects such as Infini, Width, Noos, Zen7 Labs, and BiHelix. Interactive activities such as afternoon tea, pitch-pot, and darts games will be available, offering prizes and red envelope rewards.

data.title: RWA & Payments 2026 will be held on April 20, 2026 at AWS HK Office in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
data.description: RWA & Payments 2026 will be held on April 20, 2026, at the AWS HK Office in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. The event is co-hosted by Mask Network, BenPay, and StableStock, with support from projects such as Stable, Infini, Interlace, Cregis, and Aleo. It will focus on the future development of Web3 payments, stablecoins, RWA, and on-chain financial infrastructure. The event includes keynote speeches, roundtable discussions, and a variety of social activities, including a pitch-pot game, raffles, cash prizes, token rewards, and limited-edition merchandise. Lunch and afternoon tea sessions will also be provided. Location: Tower 535, 535 Jaffe Road, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong, AWS Hong Kong Office.

data.title: Strait of Hormuz Traffic Halts Following U.S. Maritime Blockade
data.description: All maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has reportedly ceased after U.S. President Donald Trump declared a maritime blockade via social media. According to NS3.AI, information from British sources, as reported by CCTV News, indicated that the blockade had been in place for several hours. While traffic was still feasible on the 12th, at least two vessels attempting to exit the strait reversed course. Tanker traffic had seen a slight uptick on the 11th before declining on the 12th.

data.title: Alameda Research Transfers $16 Million in SOL to Creditor Distribution Address
data.description: According to Odaily, Arkham has reported that Alameda Research has unstaked $16 million worth of SOL and transferred it to an address designated for creditor distribution. This marks the first such transaction in a month.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Swiss Bank Reacquires Gold Amid Market Recovery
data.description: Swiss Bank has resumed purchasing gold after previously reducing its holdings due to market downturns triggered by the Iran war. According to Jin10, the bank had significantly cut its gold holdings from about 10% to 3% of its portfolio. Despite the challenges, Swiss Bank maintains a positive long-term outlook for gold and is gradually reintegrating it into client investment portfolios. Since the onset of the conflict, gold prices have dropped sharply due to concerns over higher interest rates and liquidity constraints. The bank's gold holdings have now increased to approximately 6% of its portfolio. Swiss Bank anticipates that gold prices will rise to $6,000 per ounce by the end of this year, driven by structural demand factors such as central bank purchases, fiscal deficit concerns, and geopolitical tensions.

data.title: Alameda Research unpledged and transferred $16 million in SOL
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, Alameda Research unpledged $16 million in SOL and sent it to the address where SOL is distributed to creditors. Its last such action was a month ago.

data.title: A vulnerability in the Polkadot bridge was exploited, resulting in the minting and subsequent sale of 1 billion DOT tokens on the Ethereum network.
data.description: Market sources indicate that a Polkadot bridge vulnerability was exploited, resulting in the minting and sale of 1 billion DOT tokens on the Ethereum network.

data.title: Richard Teng and Yi He to Speak at the 2026 Hong Kong Web3 Festival
data.description: According to Binance's post on X , Binance co-CEO Richard Teng and Yi He will appear at the 2026 Hong Kong Web3 Festival, and serve as keynote speakers on the first day of the conference. The event will be held on April 20 at the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre. Yi He will speak from 13:30 to 14:00, and Richard Teng will speak from 15:50 to 16:30.

data.title: BitMart's "BM Discovery" section now features Bull (BULL).
data.description: BitMart's "BM Discovery" section launched Bull (BULL) on April 13th at 13:00 (UTC+8), with the BULL/USDT trading pair available. Bull (BULL) is a Solana-based meme coin centered on community spirit and viral culture. BULL symbolizes power, confidence, and unstoppable upward momentum, derived from the most iconic bull market symbol. The project aims to empower the community, transforming memes into a movement driven by ordinary users rather than institutions.

data.title: Middle East Conflict Could Severely Impact Australia's Economy, Expert Warns
data.description: Calculations and analyses are currently underway regarding the potential impact of the ongoing Middle East conflict on Australia's fuel prices and economic growth. According to Jin10, David Rumbens, a partner at Deloitte Access Economics, has stated that the worst-case scenario would severely affect Australia. A prolonged conflict could drive oil prices up to $175 per barrel, with inflation rates reaching 7.5% by the end of the year. The ultimate outcome could see Australia's unemployment rate rise to 6.8%, while the GDP growth rate could decline by 2.8%. Notably, none of the proposed scenarios indicate an unemployment rate below 5.0%.

data.title: The suspected controller of Binance Life holds 110 million Binance Life tokens, worth $21.71 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, in the past 20 hours, a suspected controller of Binance Life withdrew 57.88 million Binance Life tokens from Binance through six wallets, worth $9.37 million. The token's price has risen from $0.037 to $0.22 in the past two weeks. Furthermore, this same entity withdrew 59 million Binance Life tokens from Binance through two wallets at the end of February. Currently, this entity holds approximately 116.9 million Binance Life tokens on-chain, worth $21.71 million, representing about 11.7% of the total token supply.
